problem id: aedef8e4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  10111111 -> 11110001
  00100100 -> 01000000
  10010101 -> 01010001
  10111001 -> 10010001
  01101111 -> 11110000
  00001110 -> 11100000
  00100110 -> 01100000
  10010000 -> 00000001

query: 01010001
predicted answer: 00010000
